summary: 验收 acceptance lifecycle 共享诊断边界，使 validate、preflight、run-acceptance 和 QA gate 复用同一证据链判断并保持旧 schema 兼容。

coverage.spec: 需求：验收生命周期有共享诊断 / 场景：validate、preflight、run-acceptance 复用 lifecycle
coverage.risk: 不强制所有诊断 code 名称，只验收共享边界和关键字段。

coverage.spec: 需求：required_tests 执行结果可追溯 / 场景：run-acceptance 输出 producer 和 coverage 诊断
coverage.risk: 不限制 diagnostics 内部排序，执行阶段可选择合适字段名但必须可复核。

coverage.spec: 需求：旧合同兼容 / 场景：旧 acceptance schema 不新增必填字段
coverage.risk: 不遍历所有归档提案，只用真实临时 change 验证旧 schema 兼容。

required_tests.path: docs/changes/archive/2026-06-17-39-统一验收合同校验执行证据链/tests/acceptance_lifecycle_contract_test.sh
required_tests.command: bash docs/changes/archive/2026-06-17-39-统一验收合同校验执行证据链/tests/acceptance_lifecycle_contract_test.sh | tee test-results/39-acceptance-lifecycle/acceptance-command.log
required_tests.purpose: 证明 acceptance lifecycle 共享诊断边界覆盖 validate、run-acceptance 和证据 producer 追溯。
assertions: acceptance lifecycle contract verifies oz validate and oz flow run-acceptance use a shared lifecycle diagnostics boundary for the same real change
acceptance lifecycle contract verifies run-acceptance JSON keeps old summary fields and exposes producer or coverage diagnostics for runtime evidence
acceptance lifecycle contract verifies old acceptance schema remains valid without adding new required JSON fields
required_tests.expected_initial_failure: 当前实现尚未输出统一 lifecycle diagnostics，测试应失败于目标诊断字段或共享边界缺失。

required_evidence.purpose: 记录临时真实 change 的 validate、run-acceptance 和 lifecycle diagnostics 验证过程。
